name: Werewolf in the Waldorf Salad
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Creepy Cuisine, Lucy Munroe
1. Peel, core and dice the apples; toss in a large bowl with the lemon juice.
2. Add the raisins, nuts and celery to the apples and toss together.
3. In a small bowl, mix the mayonnaise, milk and sugar until well blended.
4. Add the dressing to the other ingredients and toss.
5. Place 2 or 3 lettuce leaves on individual salad plates and spoon the salad over the lettuce in a "head" shape.
6. Decorate each salad with pointy endive ears, alfalfa sprout hair and beard, pointy carrot fangs and radish-half eyeballs.
